segments.text: Listen to an announcement at a university gym. Attention students. Starting next week, the gym will be open from 6 AM to 10 PM daily. Please ensure that you wear appropriate athletic attire and footwear while using the equipment. This helps us maintain a safe and hygienic environment and prevents damage to the machinery.
